query: SELECT pbs.projectId, p.name, pbs.scoringDimension, pbs.score, LEFT(pbs.explanation, 100) as explanation FROM projectBusinessLineScores pbs JOIN projects p ON p.id = pbs.projectId WHERE pbs.score > 0 ORDER BY pbs.score DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT pbs.projectId, p.name, pbs.scoringDimension, pbs.score, LEFT(pbs.explanation, 100) as explanation FROM projectBusinessLineScores pbs JOIN projects p ON p.id = pbs.projectId WHERE pbs.score > 0 ORDER BY pbs.score DESC LIMIT 20;
